content.full_text:
April 23, 2002

Judith Osgood
Manager of Audit Services
Contra Costa Community College
500 Court Street
Martinez, CA 94553

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-02-091

Dear Ms. Osgood:

This will confirm our April 22, 2002, telephone conversation wherein you had requested that your request for advice, Advice Letter No. 02-091 be withdrawn. That letter has now been withdrawn. As discussed, I have enclosed a copy of the Commission’s fact sheet entitled, “Limitations and Restrictions on Gifts, Honoraria, Travel and Loans.” I believe you will find this helpful.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: Jeanette E. Turvill
Political Reform Consultant
Technical Assistance Division
